name: Business Process Automation
description: End-to-end business operations workflow automating lead capture, CRM enrichment, approval routing, and executive reporting.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Lead Capture
nodes.description: Ingests new leads from web forms, ads platforms, or CRM webhook events.

nodes.label: CRM Enrichment Agent
nodes.description: Enriches lead records with company data, intent signals, and lead scoring.

nodes.label: Approval Router
nodes.description: Routes high-value leads to sales manager approval; auto-approves standard leads.

nodes.label: CRM Record Updater
nodes.description: Creates or updates CRM opportunity records and assigns to the correct sales rep.

nodes.label: Executive Report
nodes.description: Generates daily pipeline summary and emails it to configured stakeholders.
